title: ctenopteris barathrophylla
intro: Ctenopteris barathrophylla, also known as the Black Tree Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Ctenopteris barathrophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe skin irritations. Ctenopteris barathrophylla can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal applications.
